Accommodation partial-update data loss — partial JSONB objects + shallow-merge nested columns
epics.archiveNote: PR #1632 merged to staging. Converter emits partial nested objects (no default injection) + extraInfo/contactInfo deep-partial in update schema + price/extraInfo/contactInfo/socialNetworks/location added to mergeableJsonbColumns. Adversarial review caught + fixed a null-merge column-corruption bug (col::jsonb || 'null' yields [x,null], not a clear) — guarded in buildMergeSetClause. Tests: schemas 4877, db 960, api patch-persistence 13.
epics.note: P1 fix. 3 coordinated changes: converter emits partial nested objects (no default injection); AccommodationUpdateInputSchema makes extraInfo+contactInfo inner fields optional; AccommodationModel.mergeableJsonbColumns gains price/extraInfo/contactInfo/socialNetworks/location. Regression tests in schemas+db+api.

epics.note: Seed writes real domain state to make dev/test users ready (profile_completed + welcome-tour sentinel + whatsNew baseline + pw-change cleared). Zero apps/* changes. markUserReady helper + testUsers.seed wiring + db:seed:ready-user ad-hoc CLI. Scope: 13 test users + script (NOT example users). Rejected env-var bypass and is_test_account flag.

epics.title: AI accommodation search — UI/UX improvements (transparency, onboarding, chat control, layout)
epics.note: Doc-only spec; tasks NOT atomized yet. 4 workstreams: transparency (confidence), onboarding, chat control/errors, layout decision. 'Bridge to full listing' explicitly out of scope.

epics.title: Newsletter Engagement Tracking (Open / Click)
epics.archiveNote: Shipped via PR #1776 (merge c298c005a -> staging). 4/5 tasks completed + T-004 cancelled (won't-do: keep pct math client-side). Progress shown full (4 completed + 1 cancelled = all resolved).

epics.title: Amenities & features catalog by vertical (scoping + i18n source-of-truth)
epics.note: Catalog scoped by vertical via applicable_verticals text[] (migration 0028, idempotent backfill); dropped name column, slug is the i18n key; featureNames namespace added. Editors (web aloj+commerce, admin) and public pages migrated to slug+i18n. Seed re-tagged 170 + 36 new.
epics.archiveNote: Shipped via PR #1812 (merge a35f81ccc) to staging. Absorbed BETA-90. Resolved a 234-commit staging drift merge: preserved SPEC-258 amenity synonyms reaponted to slug; fixed post-merge i18n validation keys + public schema name->slug contract.

epics.title: Social Automation Backend
epics.note: 52 tasks across 4 phases (setup 14, core 23, integration 11, testing 3, cleanup 1). Shipped as chained PRs per phase. DB schema chain T-001->T-013 is critical path. Follow-ups SPEC-255/256.

epics.title: Accommodation gallery migration to relational table
epics.note: Closeout 2026-06-24: 27/29 done (T-025/T-028 deferred to SPEC-280). Direct cutover shipped — granular admin+protected media endpoints, web owner editor + admin gallery sub-tab (both per-operation), 021 blob-strip, seed T-027, docs T-029. getMedia 500 (schema not nullable) found via local smoke + fixed. Awaiting PR to staging.

epics.title: Accommodation media: remove composed blob shape from API responses
epics.note: Created as the SPEC-204 compat-debt follow-up (absorbs T-025 + T-028). Not atomized yet; gated on SPEC-204 merge.

epics.title: Accommodation import — scraper resilience (retry, fallback chain, async, provider mitigation, manual path)
epics.note: Tasks atomized for R1/R2/R4/R5 (11 tasks; R3 async path deferred to follow-up spec). Scopes: R1 withRetry wrapper in apify-client + Airbnb/Booking adapters, R2 GenericAdapter fallback for Airbnb/Booking on source_blocked, R4 provider-mitigation runbook, R5 form-usability invariant tests for web+admin.
epics.archiveNote: R1/R2/R4/R5 complete (11/11). R3 async deferred to SPEC-281. PR #1848, pending final merge.

epics.title: MercadoLibre OAuth refresh-token flow (make the ML import tier production-viable)
epics.note: Doc-only spec; tasks NOT atomized yet. Formalizes Linear BETA-96: the ML import tier uses a static 6h access token with no refresh. Replace with OAuth 2.0 authorization-code + refresh-token rotation + token service (concurrency-safe). Unblocks SPEC-258 A3 (ML field enrichment). 5 open questions for the owner before atomizing.

epics.title: Accommodation import — async extraction path for slow/blocked sources (SPEC-277 R3)
epics.note: Doc-only spec; tasks NOT atomized yet. Deferred R3 (async extraction path) carved out of SPEC-277. Reuses SPEC-250 async Apify helpers. 5 open questions for the owner before atomizing.

epics.title: Web performance audit & improvements — Core Web Vitals, 12 findings + fix catalog
epics.note: 13 tasks across 4 phases (core 3, integration 8, ci 1, testing 1); spec §6 lists 12 task IDs but T-269-02 and T-269-03 each split into a/b = 13 total. All fix tasks (T-269-03a through T-269-10) are independent and run in parallel. Only sequential chains: T-269-02a→T-269-02b and all fixes→T-269-11. POTENTE: T-269-02b (manualChunks tuning) + T-269-03b (hero SSR first-frame). SPEC-190 bundle pattern reused for apps/web.
